nodes.label: AI as tool for interpreting regulations and legal text
nodes.label_negative: Traditional manual reading of full documents
nodes.grounding_span: AI provides an easier to access, single tool, that addresses several of those shortcomings

nodes.label: AI verifiability and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: ask it to provide references to specific clauses so I can confirm what it is saying matches the text

nodes.label: AI for automated requirement extraction from standards
nodes.grounding_span: I would love to use AI to read a standard...pull out all the design and test requirements

nodes.label: AI reliability in PDF parsing and formatting
nodes.label_negative: AI errors in reading PDFs and formatting output
nodes.grounding_span: AI had trouble reading the PDF files correctly, formatting in the output was not done well

nodes.label: Intellectual property protection when using AI
nodes.label_negative: Copyright infringement via feeding standards into AI
nodes.grounding_span: licensing concerns with feeding standards under copyright into an AI

nodes.label: AI use within corporate compliance boundaries
nodes.grounding_span: get the AI to assess whether the product design complies or does not comply with a given standard

nodes.label: Professional integrity and ethical practice
nodes.grounding_span: professional ethics and my personal ethos would demand I validate the AI's work

nodes.label: Systematic verification through cross-referencing

nodes.label: Pragmatic cost-benefit analysis of AI use
nodes.grounding_span: if it could do the job competently I would be happy to let it do the bulk of the work while I take on more of a supervisory/quality control role
